channel.title: Mac on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mac on jamesm.blog

item.title: MacWhisper vs Wispr Flow vs Superwhisper: The 2026 Dictation Stack Compared
item.description: A practical breakdown of the three dictation apps every Mac user keeps hearing about - who they're for, what they cost, and where they stop being interchangeable.

item.title: Mac Applications & Utilities
item.description: Curated collection of essential macOS applications and utilities for productivity, development, file management, and system optimisation.
